meta.title: Fine tuning Whisper for Speech Transcription
meta.description:
➡️ Get LIFETIME access to the ADVANCED Transcription Repo: https://trelis.com/advanced-transcription/

🗝️ Get LIFETIME access to the Trelis Multi-Repo Bundle (https://Trelis.com/multi-repo-bundle)
- Access all SEVEN Trelis Github Repos (-robotics, -vision, -evals, -fine-tuning, -inference, -voice, -time-series)
- Support via Github Issues & Trelis’ Private Discord

KEY TRELIS LINKS:
🛠 Tools (Fine-tuning, Vision, Audio, Inference): https://Trelis.com
💡 Done-for-you Custom Fine-tuning Services: https://trelis.com/fine-tuning-services/
🤝 Work for Trelis: https://trelis.com/jobs/
💸 Grants Program: https://trelis.com/trelis-ai-grants/
📧 Newsletter: https://trelis.substack.com

Video Resources:
- Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Trelis/llm-lingo
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1_vxojbAwSzjB4L4NlNfQq0tudpyQ4ptSQtQSXE8GstM/edit?usp=sharing 
- Simple Whisper Transcription Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1tM1U2fAH30niw23l5Qz0gjWZs1AuDXlt?usp=sharing 
- Basic fine-tuning notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/github/sanchit-gandhi/notebooks/blob/main/fine_tune_whisper.ipynb#scrollTo=BRdrdFIeU78w
- PEFT Example: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1DOkD_5OUjFa0r5Ik3SgywJLJtEo2qLxO?usp=sharing#scrollTo=8d230e6d-624c-400a-bbf5-fa660881df25

Chapters
0:00  Fine-tuning speech-to-text models
0:17 Video Overview
1:39 How to transcribe YouTube videos with Whisper
7:39 How do transcription models work?
20:08 Fine-tuning Whisper with LoRA
43:32 Performance evaluation of fine-tuned Whisper
48:32 Final Tips
